hero.title: 20 years defining luxury real estate.
hero.lede: Elite Estates was founded in 2005 with a singular mission: provide discerning clients with unparalleled access to the world's finest properties.

seo.title: About
seo.description: Learn how Elite Estates built a global luxury advisory rooted in discretion, expertise, and long-term client trust.

section.title: Built on discretion, delivered with excellence
section.lede: What began as a boutique London agency has grown into a global advisory operation while preserving the discretion and specialist guidance our clients expect.
bullets: RICS member firm and international partner network
